name: Is War as Old as Gravity? (XP Alert)
phrase: Is war as old as gravity?
learned: Recreating Windows XP UI with pure CSS gradients and box-shadows
Escalating bug levels as state machine driven by user interaction
Screen tear and glitch bar effects with DOM elements
BSOD as narrative climax with restart cycle

atmosphere.palette: XP blue desktop, dialog grays, warning yellows degrading to BSOD blue
atmosphere.movement: starts static and familiar, escalates to chaos with each click
